name: PooSky
short_description: It's a sad story that could happen to any of us.
detailed_description:
Trading cards!

The new rules for Steam trading cards will not be available at the release time. In order for the cards to be approved, the game must score the right number of reviews (250-300) and a good sales level. Trading cards will be added as soon as possible. Read more about the new rules http://steamcommunity.com/games/593110/announcements/detail/1954971077935370845


About the Game

You live in a cloudless country on the special clouds. But they came, and you run away.. You have no choice. And you can not win. You can only run for fun these assfaces. How long do you survive? What will be your last race? This game is an allegory. You are Pisyun who runs to a meeting of a good game. Obstacles are indie projects, which every day more and more. You try, you search, but every time you stammer on another "masterpiece". The game is specially performed in the most beloved program of indie developers and it is at this "level" Features: - Peculiar protagonist, who expresses the identity of a community; - A unique antagonist that you will remember for a long time; - Rhythmic soundtrack; - Top Achivements; - Deep sense.
